app.title: Exile Leveling
route.help.kill.0.description: Kill a monster, certain bosses unlock waypoints
route.help.area.0.parameter.0: Area Id used internally by Path Of Exile
route.help.enter.0.parameter.0: Area Id used internally by Path Of Exile
route.help.logout.0.description: Logout or Exit to Character Selection, removes portals
route.help.waypoint.1.parameter.0: Area Id used internally by Path Of Exile
route.help.waypoint_get.0.description: Unlocks the waypoint for the current zone
route.help.portal.0.description: Sets portal to the current area
route.help.portal.1.description: Use the portal in the current area, places a portal if required
route.help.quest.0.description: Hand in a quest and receive all reward offers, generates gem steps
route.help.quest.0.parameter.0: Quest Id used internally by Path Of Exile
route.help.quest.1.description: Hand in a quest and receive specified reward offer, generates gem steps
route.help.quest.1.parameter.0: Quest Id used internally by Path Of Exile
route.help.quest.1.parameter.1: Reward Offer Id used internally by Path Of Exile
route.help.reward_quest.0.description: Quest rewards a player should take
route.help.reward_vendor.0.description: Vendor rewards a player should buy
route.help.trial.0.description: Complete the ascendancy trial in the current area
route.help.crafting.0.description: Get the crafting recipe in the current area
route.help.dir.0.parameter.0: Number of degrees in multiples of 45, where 0 = Up
reward.missingGem: This is awkward, {gem} doesn't seem to exist
error.prefix: Oops, something seems to have broken. Click
